# Adbnik v1.3.2

## Fixes

- **Explorer:** SFTP/FTP pull by **drag-and-drop** now triggers **open with default application** for pulled files, consistent with using the **Pull** button.
- **Terminal:** **Commands → SSH** quick commands no longer prepend extra blank lines; the caret moves to the end of the buffer after the command so typing continues on the new prompt line.

**Full changelog:** [CHANGELOG.md — 1.3.2](https://github.com/nvnkennedy/adbnik/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
